gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/enabled_by.snippet: tph-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00006600 in C. elegans; tryptophan hydroxylase expressed in ADF neurons, required for serotonin biosynthesis and fat storage regulation

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/enabled_by.snippet: mod-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00003386 in C. elegans; serotonin-gated chloride channel expressed in URX neurons, mediates 5-HT signaling for fat beta-oxidation

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/enabled_by.snippet: ser-6 resolved to WB:WBGene00021897 in C. elegans; octopamine receptor expressed in AWB neurons, participates in octopamine signaling for fat beta-oxidation

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/enabled_by.snippet: tbh-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00006541 in C. elegans; tyramine-beta hydroxylase in RIC neurons, synthesizes octopamine

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/enabled_by.snippet: nhr-76 resolved to WB:WBGene00015497 in C. elegans; nuclear receptor/transcription factor in intestine, activates ATGL transcription downstream of neuronal signals

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/enabled_by.snippet: atgl-1 resolved to WB:WBGene00015484 in C. elegans; adipose triglyceride lipase expressed in intestine lipid droplets, drives triglyceride catabolism and fat loss

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/molecular_funct.snippet: tph-1 annotated with tryptophan 5-monooxygenase activity (ISS/IBA); catalyzes rate-limiting step of serotonin biosynthesis from tryptophan in ADF neurons

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/molecular_funct.snippet: mod-1 annotated with serotonin-gated chloride channel activity (IDA); directly binds serotonin and gates chloride ions as an ionotropic 5-HT receptor in URX neurons

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/molecular_funct.snippet: ser-6 annotated with octopamine receptor activity (IDA/IBA); functions as GPCR for octopamine in AWB neurons, participates in octopamine signaling for fat beta-oxidation

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/molecular_funct.snippet: tbh-1 annotated with tyramine-beta hydroxylase activity (IMP/IEA/IBA); converts tyramine to octopamine in RIC neurons

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/molecular_func.snippet: nhr-76 annotated with DNA-binding transcription factor activity (IEA) and positive regulation of transcription by RNA Pol II (IMP); nuclear receptor that activates atgl-1 transcription in intestine

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/molecular_func.snippet: atgl-1 annotated with triacylglycerol lipase activity (IEA/IBA); C. elegans adipose triglyceride lipase that catabolizes triglycerides on lipid droplets in intestine

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/part_of.snippet: tph-1 annotated with serotonin biosynthetic process from L-tryptophan (IMP/IBA); required for 5-HT production in ADF neurons that drives downstream fat-loss signaling

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/part_of.snippet: mod-1 annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IMP); URX neuron 5-HT receptor that initiates endocrine signal for intestinal fat beta-oxidation

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/part_of.snippet: ser-6 annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by octopamine signaling pathway (IMP); octopamine receptor in AWB that transduces octopamine signal toward fat beta-oxidation

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/part_of.snippet: tbh-1 annotated with octopamine biosynthetic process (IMP); synthesizes octopamine in RIC neurons that signals to AWB via ser-6

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/part_of.snippet: nhr-76 annotated with positive regulation of transcription by RNA Pol II (IMP) and positive regulation of FA beta-oxidation by both serotonin and octopamine signaling pathways (IMP); activates atgl-1 transcription in intestine

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/part_of.snippet: atgl-1 annotated with triglyceride catabolic process (IEA/IBA); performs lipolysis in intestinal lipid droplets driving beta-oxidation and fat loss downstream of nhr-76

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/occurs_in.snippet: tph-1 protein localizes to neuron projection (IDA/IBA); consistent with its expression in ADF neuron projections where serotonin is synthesized and released

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/occurs_in.snippet: mod-1 localizes to plasma membrane (IDA/IBA) and neuronal cell body (IDA); ionotropic 5-HT receptor on URX neuron surface

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/occurs_in.snippet: ser-6 annotated with plasma membrane localization (IEA/IBA); GPCR octopamine receptor on AWB neuron surface

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/occurs_in.snippet: tbh-1 localizes to synapse (IDA); tyramine-beta hydroxylase produces octopamine at RIC neuron synaptic terminals for paracrine/endocrine release

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/occurs_in.snippet: nhr-76 annotated with nucleus localization (IEA/IBA); nuclear receptor transcription factor active in intestinal cell nuclei

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/occurs_in.snippet: atgl-1 annotated with lipid droplet localization (IDA/IBA); performs triglyceride lipolysis directly on intestinal lipid droplets

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: tph-1 in ADF produces serotonin (5-HT) that activates mod-1 serotonin-gated chloride channel on URX neuron. mod-1 is annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IMP); tph-1 mutants show reduced Patgl-1::GFP, consistent with this upstream role

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: tbh-1 in RIC neurons synthesizes octopamine (Oct) which activates ser-6 octopamine receptor in AWB neuron. ser-6 is annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by octopamine signaling pathway (IMP); tbh-1 catalyzes the biosynthetic step producing octopamine (GO:0006589, IMP)

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: dashed arrow from URX (mod-1) neurons to INTESTINE indicating endocrine signal. Panels C-D show Pflp-8::mod-1SAS (dominant-negative mod-1 in URX) blocks 5-HT-induced Patgl-1::GFP increase. nhr-76 is annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IMP), placing it downstream of mod-1 in the same pathway

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: neuronal octopamine signaling (via ser-6 in AWB) feeds into intestinal nhr-76 via endocrine signal. nhr-76 annotated with positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by octopamine signaling pathway (IMP), placing it downstream of ser-6 octopamine receptor activity

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/causal/gomodel.snippet: Panel E: nhr-76 → ATGL arrow in INTESTINE compartment. nhr-76 annotated with positive regulation of transcription by RNA Pol II (IMP) and with both serotonin and octopamine fat beta-oxidation pathways (IMP). Reporter Patgl-1::GFP used throughout the figure demonstrates transcriptional regulation of atgl-1 by nhr-76
